prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Scheme. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```scheme
#!/usr/bin/env gsi-script

;; minigit implementation in Scheme

(define *git-dir* ".minigit")
(define *index-file* (string-append *git-dir* "/index"))
(define *objects-dir* (string-append *git-dir* "/objects"))

(define (mkdir-p dir)
  (let loop ((parts (string-split (string-append dir "/") #\/))
             (path ""))
    (if (null? parts)
        #t
        (let ((new-path (string-append path (car parts) "/")))
          (if (not (file-exists? new-path))
              (create-directory new-path))
          (loop (cdr parts) new-path)))))

(define (file-exists? path)
  (let ((port (open-input-file path)))
    (if port
        (begin (close-port port) #t)
        #f)))

(define (read-file path)
  (let ((port (open-input-file path)))
    (if port
        (let ((content (read-line port)))
          (close-port port)
          content)
        #f)))

(define (write-file path content)
  (let ((port (open-output-file path)))
    (write-string port content)
    (close-port port)))

(define (write-string port str)
  (let loop ((i 0))
    (when (< i (string-length str))
      (write-char (string-ref str i) port)
      (loop (+ i 1)))))

(define (string-split str char)
  (let loop ((start 0)
             (i 0)
             (result '()))
    (cond ((>= i (string-length str))
           (if (> (- i start) 0)
               (cons (substring str start i) result)
               result))
          ((char=? (string-ref str i) char)
           (loop (+ i 1) (+ i 1) (cons (substring str start i) result)))
          (else
           (loop start (+ i 1) result)))))

(define (hash-string str)
  (let ((len (string-length str)))
    (let ((hash (modulo (+ len 123456789) 1000000007)))
      (number->string hash 16))))

(define (main args)
  (if (< (length args) 2)
      (display "Usage: minigit <command> [<args>...]\n")
      (let ((command (car args))
            (args (cdr args)))
        (cond
         ((string=? command "init") (cmd-init))
         ((string=? command "add") (cmd-add (car args)))
         ((string=? command "commit") (cmd-commit (car args)))
         ((string=? command "log") (cmd-log))
         (else (display "Unknown command\n"))))))

(define (cmd-init)
  (if (file-exists? *git-dir*)
      (display "minigit already initialized\n")
      (begin
        (mkdir-p *git-dir*)
        (mkdir-p *objects-dir*)
        (display "Initialized empty minigit repository\n"))))

(define (cmd-add filename)
  (if (not (file-exists? *git-dir*))
      (display "Not a minigit repository\n")
      (if (not (file-exexists? filename))
          (display "File not found\n")
          (let ((content (read-file filename)))
            (if content
                (let ((hash (hash-string content)))
                  (write-file (string-append *objects-dir* "/" hash) content)
                  (write-file *index-file* hash)
                  (display "Added file\n"))
                (display "Error reading file\n"))))))

(define (file-exexists? path)
  (let ((port (open-input-file path)))
    (if port
        (begin (close-port port) #t)
        #f)))

(define (cmd-commit message)
  (if (not (file-exists? *git-dir*))
      (display "Not a minigit repository\n")
      (if (not (file-exists? *index-file*))
          (display "No changes to commit\n")
          (let ((hash (read-file *index-file*)))
            (if hash
                (let ((log-file (string-append *git-dir* "/log")))
                  (let ((log-content (if (file-exists? log-file)
                                         (string-append (read-file log-file) "\n" hash " " message)
                                         (string-append hash " " message))))
                    (write-file log-file log-content)
                    (display "Committed changes\n"))))
                (display "Error reading index\n"))))))

(define (cmd-log)
  (if (not (file-exists? *git-dir*))
      (display "Not a minigrant repository\n")
      (let ((log-file (string-append *git-dir* "/log")))
        (if (file-exists? log-file)
            (display (read-file log-file))
            (display "No commits yet\n")))))

(define (read-line port)
  (let loop ((line '()))
    (let ((char (read-char port)))
      (cond ((eof-object? char)
             (if (null? line)
                 char
                 (list->string (reverse line))))
            ((char=? char #\newline)
             (list->string (reverse line)))
            (else
             (loop (cons char line)))))))

(define (list->string lst)
  (let ((str (make-string (length lst))))
    (let loop ((i 0) (lst lst))
      (if (null? lst)
          str
          (begin
            (string-set! str i (car lst))
            (loop (+ i 1) (cdr lst)))))))

(define (make-string k)
  (let ((str (make-string k)))
    (do ((i  0 (+ i 1)))
        ((= i k) str)
      (string-set! str i #\space))))

(define (string-set! str k char)
  (set! str (string-append (substring str 0 k) (string char) (substring str (+ k 1) (string-length str)))))

(define (substring str start end)
  (let ((result (make-string (- end start))))
    (do ((i start (+ i 1))
         (j 0 (+ j 1)))
        ((= i end) result)
      (string-set! result j (string-ref str i)))))

(define (string-append . args)
  (apply string-append args))

(define (string-ref str k)
  (let ((len (string-length str)))
    (if (or (< k 0) (>= k len))
        (error "string-ref: index out of range")
        (let ((port (open-input-file str)))
          (do (( i 0 (+ i 1)))
              ((= i k)
               (let ((ch (read-char port)))
                 (close-port port)
                 ch))
            (read-char port))))))

(define (string-length str)
  (let ((port (open-input-file str)))
    (let loop ((len 0))
      (if (eof-object? (read-char port))
          (begin (close-port port) len)
          (loop (+ len 1))))))

(define (number->string num . args)
  (let ((base (if (null? args) 10 (car args))))
    (let loop ((n num) (result '()))
      (if (< n base)
          (list->string (cons (integer->char n) result))
          (loop (quotient n base) (cons (integer->modulo n base) result))))))

(define (integer->char n)
  (let ((ch (integer->char n)))
    ch))

(define (integer->modulo n base)
  (let ((ch (integer->modulo n base)))
    ch))

(define (char=? char1 char2)
  (eq? char1 char2))

(define (eof-object? obj)
  (eq? obj #!eof))

(define (display obj)
  (write obj))

(define (write obj)
  (write obj))

(define (read-char port)
  (read-char port))

(define (open-input-file path)
  (open-input-file path))

(define (open-output-file path)
  (open-output-file path))

(define (close-port port)
  (close-port port))

(define (create-directory path)
  (create-directory path))

(define (file-exists? path)
  (file-exists? path))

(define (read-file path)
  (read-file path))

(define (write-file path content)
  (write-file path content))

(define (hash-string str)
  (hash-string str))

(define (main args)
  (main args))

(define (cmd-init)
  (cmd-init))

(define (cmd-add filename)
  (cmd-add filename))

(define (cmd-commit message)
  (cmd-commit message))

(define (cmd-log)
  (cmd-log))

(define (read-line port)
  (read-line port))

(define (list->string lst)
  (list->string lst))

(define (make-string k)
  (make-string k))

(define (string-set! str k char)
  (string-set! str k char))

(define (substring str start end)
  (substring str start end))

(define (string-append . args)
  (apply string-append args))

(define (string-ref str k)
  (string-ref str k))

(define (string-length str)
  (string-length str))

(define (number->string num . args)
  (number->string num . args))

(define (integer->char n)
  (integer->char n))

(define (integer->modulo n base)
  (integer->modulo n base))

(define (char=? char1 char2)
  (char=? char1 char2))

(define (eof-object? obj)
  (eof-object? obj))

(define (display obj)
  (display obj))

(define (write obj)
  (write obj))

(define (read-char port)
  (read-char port))

(define (open-input-file path)
  (open-input-file path))

(define (open-output-file path)
  (open-output-file path))

(apply main (command-line))
```
